text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I come across Air Shakur out in town,
and we decide to head back to the academy
together. On the way...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!
choice_data_list: That looks like fun.
That looks like fun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur doesn't look all that interested, but I
remember receiving a raffle ticket earlier when I
was shopping. I hold it out to her.
choice_data_list: Want to give it a try?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Why? Do it yourself.
choice_data_list: I bet you'd be able to get the prize you want.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Are you serious?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Listen, raffles aren't about gettin' what you want.
The anticipation of what you might end up with is
what makes them fun.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Where's your sense of adventure?
choice_data_list: Do you really think that?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: 'Course I don't.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like she could not be less invested in the
raffle, but if we manage to win the grand prize...
choice_data_list: (Air Shakur could finally get a breather.)

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Um... So are you two interested in giving this a
whirl, or are you just standing there for fun?
choice_data_list: We'd like to give it a try, please!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Oho, very nice. And what do you have your eyes
on?
choice_data_list: The hot spring getaway!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
What, you plannin' on enterin' this thing a million
times? There's no way you'll actually win that.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Well, whatever. Go on and spin it already.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A glint of poorly concealed interest shines in Air
Shakur's eyes as she watches me turn the handle
on the raffle machine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Ooh.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Well, well, well. Who would've thunk?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hey. How many people have entered this raffle so
far? And what are the odds of winning the grand
prize?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tell me the demographics of everyone who tried
and how they turned the handle... Have you been
tracking all the statistics?.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: Um... I don't have a clue about any of that.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hmph. Figures.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
But I mean, you won the grand prize... Aren't you
happy? It's not every day you get to go on a hot
spring vacation.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I'm not the one who wanted it in the first place.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Well then, Trainer! You go ahead and enjoy your
trip!
choice_data_list: Oh, uh... Thanks! I... guess I will.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I thought you wanted that coupon. Wouldn't hurt
to be more cheerful about it.
choice_data_list: Are you not a fan of hot springs?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I don't have anythin' against 'em. I just don't like
the idea of a makin' a whole trip out of it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I hate constantly bein' around people as is, so
why would I wanna sit around in a bath with a
bunch of strangers?
choice_data_list:
Huh? I thought the dorm had a shared bath,
though. Aren't you used to it?

Huh? I thought the dorm had a shared bath,
though. Aren't you used to it?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I just use the showers when no one's around.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You have to shower before getting in the bath
anyways, so why bother? I only get in if I have to.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not a fan of long, relaxing soaks—noted. I guess
she wouldn't enjoy visiting a hot spring very
much, then.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
What's with the questions, anyway? You're
usually always so careful about boundaries.
choice_data_list: I was just curious.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Well, you're startin' to creep me out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, despite miraculously winning the grand
prize, the fate of the vacation coupon remains
unclear...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
First prize, huh? Wasn't exactly what you were
aiming for, though. Too bad.
choice_data_list: But still, what are the odds?
But still, what are the odds?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, technically it's a good prize. But do you
even want that?
choice_data_list: You can have it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hey, don't offload your trash on me.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Wait, you don't want it? But a lot of Umamusume
come here specifically to try for the carrot
hamburger steak.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Cool story. Too bad I'm not one of them.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: But it's really, really delicious! The local butchers, bakeries, greengrocers, and restaurants all came together to create this! It's the shopping district's pride and joy!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Looks like it. Good for you.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Huh. You're not even the slightest bit tempted to
try it?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I'll eat it if I need the fuel.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
No, no! My pride is at stake here. This prize was
designed to make our Umamusume customers
happy.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: I won't let you leave until you're satisfied!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Ma! You there?! Warm up this hamburger
steak for me!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: The hell? I said I don't want it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One thing leads to another, and Air Shakur ends
up trying the deluxe carrot hamburger steak on
the spot. After her first bite...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Pretty good.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: Woo-hoo! I told you it's delicious!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I'm no culinary connoisseur or whatever,
but this isn't half bad.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: All right, now let's see those pearly whites!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Not a chance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And with that, Air Shakur finishes her meal.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...They sure are orange.
choice_data_list: They sure are.
They sure are.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: And packed with plenty of nutrients. Bon appetit!
choice_data_list:
(Maybe we can give some to the other
students...)

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We can have these delivered if you'd like... but
I'm sure your friend here can carry them no
problem.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
choice_data_list: Actually, I can do it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: They're quite heavy, you know. Are you sure?
choice_data_list: I work out, so I should be fine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've developed a habit of doing the same
exercises I think up for Air Shakur to gain a better
understanding of their benefits. I think I'm quite
fit for my age.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...We could at least rent a cart or something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to take Air Shakur's advice and borrow a
cart from the shopping district to wheel the
carrots back to the academy. However...
choice_data_list: (It's so... heavy!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I guess pushing it slows me down too much,
because Air Shakur leaves me behind.
choice_data_list: (I'm not going back on my word! Let's do this!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I take a few more steps forward until...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Are you the trainer who's distributing carrots
to everyone?
choice_data_list: The... what?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I saw a post on Umatter about a trainer heading
toward Tracen handing out a ton of carrots to
people!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I was hoping I could nab a bunch for myself if I
caught you early!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to have some too. As many as possible,
please!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Oh! We'd like some carrots too, please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In no time, a mob of Umamusume descends upon
me, and the carrots disappear faster than I can
figure out what's happening.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By the time I arrive on campus, there are none
left. That's not the way I planned to hand out
carrots, but all things considered, I'm glad it
worked out.
choice_data_list:
(I bet I can guess who made that Umatter
post...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just when I finish making a mental note to thank
my mystery benefactor, another Umamusume
approaches me.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
You're the one passing out carrots, right? Hi
there!
choice_data_list: Uh... Hello...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My new reputation continues to plague me for
some time.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: One carrot, huh? Too bad.
choice_data_list: But the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Tough luck. Hurry up and take your prize already.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Heh, look at you standing there holding your lone
carrot.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: You're like the perfect illustration of dumbstruck.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This could be my chance to entertain Air Shakur! I
hoist up the carrot like a sword.
choice_data_list: How do you like me now?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...And you killed it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Forcing a joke's the best way to sour it. It was
only funny before because it was spontaneous.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: And stop trying to suck up to me. It's gross.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After I get home, the sweetness of the carrot
offers me some small comfort.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Sucks to be you.
choice_data_list: Aw, man...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I had a feeling this's what you'd end up
with, statistically speaking.
choice_data_list: I wanted to take you to the hot spring though...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hmph. So that's what this was all about.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It's not like I wanted to go in the first place, so
what are you all disappointed for? Cut it out,
loser.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite what she says, she does look the slightest
bit disappointed.
...Or maybe that's just what I'm telling myself.
